reapack.name: Swap-ItemsPositionsOnSameTracks.lua
reapack.desc: Swap the position of 2 selected items

metadata.description: # Swap-ItemsPositionsOnSameTracks Contextual Swap to Between to Items for listening A/B for Reaper 7.0. This script was developed with the help of GitHub Copilot.

reapack.name: TimeShift.lua
reapack.desc: Contextual edit/SHIFT for items, time selection, and cursor position

metadata.description: # TimeShift Contextual edit/SHIFT for Items, Time Selection, and Cursor Position in Reaper 7.0. This script was developed with the help of GitHub Copilot.
# View-FieldRecorder-Metadatas Contextual display selected item metadata for Reaper 7.0. This script was developed with the help of GitHub Copilot.
# Interactive-TC-Display Contextual display of TimeCode / Items / Status for Reaper 7.0. This script was developed with the help of GitHub Copilot.

reapack.name: CreateTracksFromText.lua
reapack.desc: Create named and structured tracks from text

metadata.description: # CreateTracksFromText Contextual Create Tracks in Reaper with Name/Parent/children/Spacer and colors by entering a text in form. This script was developed with the help of GitHub Copilot.
